scope: Composition, attention route, product proof, responsive authorship, degraded evidence state and catalog action for the golden slice.
findings: The message-proof-action sequence communicates category, public-life outcome and a low-risk catalog route within the first viewport.
The public-record composition is product-specific and turns loose files into an inspectable owned URL without fictional spectacle.
Mobile is independently authored, preserves public-before-auth order and remains intact at 390px and 320px.
Expired proof fails closed, while reduced motion preserves meaning and all eight runtime cases remain overflow-free.
residuals: Evidence remains expert-proxy only and does not claim participant research, eye tracking or conversion lift.
Record anatomy, adjacent routes, final auth handoff, accessibility, performance, content stress and final state coverage remain for system build.
System build must keep authentication after product proof on mobile, keep material conditions at 14px or larger and preserve date, demo boundary and fail-closed screenshot behavior.
Later chapters must not repeat the Hero or collapse into generic feature cards; final acceptance still requires fresh blind Human-QA and full Caster, Anton and production review.
